body:
## Problem

`/drummers/<slug>/gear-history` pages are getting SSR meta title/description via issue #1308 (approved, in queue). But that fix adds only title/description — **no BreadcrumbList JSON-LD**.

Gear history pages represent a unique content type ("drummer's kit over the years") that benefits from explicit crawl hierarchy.

## Pages Affected

Currently 3 known gear-history pages (for drummers with multi-era gear data):
- `/drummers/bill-ward/gear-history`
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/gear-history`
- (any other drummer with `gearHistory` data)

## Fix

In `api/meta/[...path].js`, find the gear-history handler (added by #1308) and add `breadcrumbSchema`:

```javascript
const gearHistoryMatch = path.match(/^\/drummers\/([a-z0-9-]+)\/gear-history$/);
if (gearHistoryMatch) {
  const [, drummerSlug] = gearHistoryMatch;
  const drummer = getDrummerBySlug(drummerSlug);
  if (drummer) {
    return {
      title: `${drummer.name} Drum Kit History — Gear Through the Years | ${SITE_NAME}`,
      description: ...,
      // existing fields from #1308 ...
      breadcrumbSchema: [
        { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
        { name: drummer.name, url: `${BASE_URL}/${drummerSlug}` },
        { name: 'Gear History', url: `${BASE_URL}/drummers/${drummerSlug}/gear-history` },
      ],
    };
  }
}
```

## Files to Touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` — extend the gear-history handler added by #1308

## Sequencing Note

Implement AFTER #1308 ships (or in the same PR if implementing both). The breadcrumb extends #1308's handler; no conflict if done in one pass.

## Quality Gate

- `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/drummers/bill-ward/gear-history | jq '.breadcrumbSchema'` → 3-item array
- Items: Home / [Drummer Name] / Gear History
- BreadcrumbList renders correctly in Rich Results Test

## Estimated Uplift

Completes the 3-level crawl hierarchy for gear-history pages. Pairs with #1308 SSR meta to make these pages fully discoverable and schema-rich.

## Done

- [ ] BreadcrumbList JSON-LD present in SSR for gear-history pages
- [ ] 3-level hierarchy: Home → Drummer → Gear History
- [ ] No conflict with #1308 (same handler, same PR or sequenced after)
title: SEO: Gear-history pages — add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema (~3 pages)
